titleStmt.title: SII 29.17: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 17. (A.R. No. B. 779 of 1962-63.) NIPPĀṆI, CHIKKODI TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup outside the Mallikārjuna temple.

This damaged record is belongs to the reign period of Chālukya Jagadēkamalla [Jayasiṁha II] and states that the queen Sōmaladēvi while administering a division [name not clear] installed the image of goddess Sarasvati at Supāṇi and gifted 300 mattar of land and two gardens for the worship and offerings of the goddess and for feeding students and teachers of an educational institution attached to the temple. Further, she made a gift of 50 gadyāṇa also.

As post script another gift has been recorded in the inscription. Durgasimha, the ṁane-verggaḍe of the queen Sōmaladēvi, built the Sarasvati maṇḍapa [probably in the same teMple] at Supāṇi [modern Nippāṇi].
The record is dated Śaka 960, Bahudhānya, Vaiśākha ba. 5, Thursday. It corresponds to 1038 A.D., April 26. The week day was however Wednesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraka
satyāśraya kuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī majjagadēkamalladēvara
pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārka tāraṁ saluttami
sahasra phaḷabhōga bhāgiṇī dvitīya lakṣmī jana
na kalpa sahajavijagi śrī matsōmaladēviyaru
ssukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyvuttamiddu . sakavarṣa 960 ba
hudhānya saṁvatsarada vaiśākha bahuḷa paṁcami bṛhaspativāradaṁdu
viśudda kīrttigāśraya
ya(sya) tamō pannadāyuta sōmaladēvi sarasvati pratiṣThe yaṁ
dēviyar sarasvati pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi supāṇiyalli
mānyaṁ māḍi muṁnūṟu mattarkkeyya
yāgi sarasvatidēvige dhārāpūrvvaka biṭṭa
kai matta rirppattāṟu Akṣaravanōduva vidyārtthi
ke mattariḻpattāṟu tōṁṭa matteraḍu Aṣṭabhogadāyasva māḍi
mattarirppatta nālku supāṇi
Āyvattu gadyāṇa ponaṁ miḻdu dāna yaṁ kō(ḷma)tara mayya
pāḷisidavaṁge prayāga vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradali sūryagrahaṇa
kāladali da kārakarappa subrāhmaṇargge . sāsira ka
vileya dāna goṭṭa phala makku doḷ sāsira ka
vileyaṁ sāsirvvar brāhmaṇarumanaḷida mahā pātakakke podu makku . ślōka .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭarvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāya
te krimiḥ . . bhūmidāna jadārjidāna magōḍu namaṁ kantha dāna duṁ bhōma
dāna manōhara dāna ma ḷya dāna ma ta dānamaṁ svāmi dēva samyāḷū kaṁ
kiyu nartthi saṁdā harēka puṇyādhi rāmadaṁ nṛpālanu naṁkaddarā sōmaladēvi
dāni sōmaladēviya nakhiḷa buhi mahītaya nuṟvi kalpalateya
virāma jayaṁ nijavata śikhāmaṇiya dharmma mūrtiya ḻadarājaṁ .
danisida sōmaladēviya maneverggaḍe durggāsiṁha vinaya nidāna
budhajana vinutaguṇa viḻitaḷiya niyamakramadi vṛtta paṇḍitabṛṁda kalpa
parargōma gōtra sarōja paṇḍamārtaṇḍanudāra pāruparita ratnavibhū
ṣaṇaṁ mahīmaṇḍaḷa maṇḍanaṁ kavijanāśraya yēkaṁ sarasvati maṇḍapa
mrijaga pogaṟe sida mudadi supāṇiyāda . vinayanidhi śiṣṭa kalpa
ma bhōjaṁ satyavrata vipra vaṁśana tōmaṇḍaḷa paṇḍa bhānuviggasthaddāka śrī
manu vāmanaṁda niśaṁ dhāriṇi baṇṇi nijayaśōdaka lāvita bhōLetter is ka written above the line.
da mārgga nanārādhita bhaggē naśvata ḷvargge naṁdugana .
Digital edition of SII 29.17 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
